Bloomberg Expands Index Suite Measuring US Short-Duration Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS) Markets
F/m Investments Launches Industry First Ultrashort Treasury Inflation-Protected Security (TIPS) ETF (RBIL)

overview.description: The F/m Ultrashort Treasury Inflation-Protected Security (TIPS) ETF (RBIL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index that provides exposure to US Treasury inflation-protected securities with maturities from 1 to 13 months. The portfolio is equally weighted by sub-components based on maturities. RBIL was launched on Feb 24, 2025 and is issued by F/m Investments.
infoTable: Bloomberg U.S. Ultrashort TIPS 1-13 Months Index
